EngineVersion.description: The version of the Neptune engine.

Port.description: The port number on which the cluster accepts connections.

DBSubnetGroupName.description: The name of a DB subnet group.

VpcSecurityGroupIds.description: A list of VPC security group IDs.

KmsKeyId.description: The KMS key identifier for an encrypted cluster.

PreferredBackupWindow.description: The daily time range for automated backups (UTC).

PreferredMaintenanceWindow.description: The weekly time range for maintenance (UTC).

BackupRetentionPeriod.description: The number of days for which automated backups are retained (1-35).

IAMDatabaseAuthenticationEnabled.description: Whether to enable IAM database authentication.
